question_text: Microwave ovens use electromagnetic radiation with a frequency of 2.45 GHz to heat food. Which statement correctly describes the relationship between the frequency and wavelength of these microwaves?

options.label: B
options.text: Frequency and wavelength are inversely proportional

options.label: C
options.text: Frequency and wavelength are directly proportional

options.label: D
options.text: Wavelength has no relationship to frequency

explanation: According to c = fλ, when frequency increases, wavelength must decrease (and vice versa) to keep the speed of light constant. This is an inverse relationship.
